title: Blocky's Custom Vanilla
description: Want to enjoy a beautiful vanilla experience with a few tweaks? This is the perfect modpack for you!
body:
![BCV Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/98aa61cca2b107e3d7af0d66debf4ed19f22464e.png)

![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)
![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)
![forge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/unsupported/forge_vector.svg)

---

### Welcome to Blocky's Custom Vanilla!
...a carefully crafted modpack designed to elevate the vanilla Minecraft experience with thoughtful enhancements. This modpack reflects my vision of what Minecraft could (and should) feel like in the future, combining the core charm of vanilla with modern gameplay refinements.

---

### What's Inside?

Blocky's Custom Vanilla (BCV) offers a seamless blend of **visual upgrades**, **resource enhancements**, and **lightweight mods**, all meticulously selected to complement the vanilla game without overwhelming its original essence. Here’s what you can expect:
- Shaders: Complementary Reimagined + Euphoria Patches
- Mods: BCV enhances gameplay mechanics and usability, ensuring a smoother and more enjoyable experience. Built on the shoulders of [Vanilla Perfected](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vanilla-perfected), but with a personal touch to suit my vision.

---
